Client Stories

Real people.
Real transformation.

The proof is in the people. Hear directly from those whose lives were changed through Amy's work.

"
After playing football at Veteran's Stadium in Philadelphia, I have collected a few bumps and bruises. Painful aching of neck, spine and shoulders are consistent reminders of the intense contact on the worst playing surface in the NFL. However, thanks to Energy Healing with Amy, in just two sessions I have found relief. I am back on the golf course, in the gym and back in the pool doing aerobics. Looking forward to more sessions and feeling better!
JB
John Bunting
#95 Philadelphia Eagles (1972–1982)
✦ 2 Sessions
✦ Chronic Pain Relief
✦ Back to Full Activity
More Stories

Voices from Amy's community

★★★★★
"When I arrived, I was barely able to walk. After both healing sessions with Amy, I was immediately pain-free and able to walk. One of the most cathartic and transformative experiences I've ever had. Amy's beautiful energy and gifted practice speak for themselves."
MM
Meg Megettigan-Murphy
Registered Nurse, 25 Years Experience
★★★★★
"I came to Amy completely burned out and disconnected from myself. After just one session, I felt a lightness I hadn't felt in years. Her beautiful energy and deep intuition made it feel completely safe to let go."
SC
Sarah C.
Virtual Session Client
★★★★★
"I had been struggling with insomnia for over two years. After three sessions with Amy, I was finally sleeping through the night. She has a gift that's hard to put into words — you just have to experience it."
MR
Michael R.
Easton, MD
